editorial_note: Cerebras refiles its S-1 for a Nasdaq (CBRS) listing with $510M 2025 revenue, a swing to $87.9M net income, and a $20B OpenAI anchor contract for 750MW of inference compute. Second attempt after the 2024 filing was withdrawn during a CFIUS review tied to G42.

related_articles.context: Prior $10B OpenAI-Cerebras arrangement that the S-1's $20B+ commitment effectively doubles
OpenAI's $122B round — same capital cycle powering the Cerebras compute contract
